parityReport.promotionPolicy: Provider worker claims can promote only when swarm manifest, child-session runtime, provider transcript, claim refs, hashes, and failure/repair refs agree.

sharedMergeLedger.promotionPolicy: multi-provider provider-worker rows must share one live provider-backed claim/failure/repair merge ledger across pass and retry windows before any final claim is promotable

liveProviderBackedSharedLedgerMatrix.promotionPolicy: pass workers share the same live provider-backed merge ledger before promotion
retry/repair workers stay on the same claim/failure/repair ledger while terminal state is decided

windows.promotionPolicy: pass workers share provider-backed ledger before promotion
gamma retry rows stay bound to beta provider context and shared ledger
delta timeout retry rows stay bound to alpha provider context and shared ledger
terminal merge covers all workers, claims, failure refs, repair refs and manifests

positiveRequirements: all WorkerChildSessionRuntimeBatchV1 sessions match parityRows by workerId, modelId, sessionDir, hashes, mergeKey, claimRefs, failureRepairRefs, and env-ref-only provider refs
